original_query: select s_acctbal, s_name, n_name, p_partkey, p_mfgr, s_address, s_phone, s_comment from part, supplier, partsupp, nation, region where p_partkey = ps_partkey and s_suppkey = ps_suppkey and p_size = 6 and p_type like '%NICKEL' and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'EUROPE' and ps_supplycost = ( select min(ps_supplycost) from partsupp, supplier, nation, region where p_partkey = ps_partkey and s_suppkey = ps_suppkey and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'EUROPE' ) order by s_acctbal desc, n_name, s_name, p_partkey limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_parts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey, p_mfgr
    FROM part
    WHERE p_size = 6 AND p_type LIKE '%NICKEL'
),
min_supply_cost AS (
    SELECT ps_partkey, MIN(ps_supplycost) as min_cost
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    WHERE r.r_name = 'EUROPE'
    GROUP BY ps_partkey
)
SELECT s.s_acctbal, s.s_name, n.n_name, p.p_partkey, p.p_mfgr, 
       s.s_address, s.s_phone, s.s_comment
FROM filtered_parts p
JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN min_supply_cost msc ON ps.ps_partkey = msc.ps_partkey AND ps.ps_supplycost = msc.min_cost
JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC, n.n_name, s.s_name, p.p_partkey
LIMIT 100;

rewritten_query:
WITH min_asia_costs AS (
    SELECT ps_partkey, MIN(ps_supplycost) as min_supplycost
    FROM partsupp
    JOIN supplier s ON s.s_suppkey = partsupp.ps_suppkey
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    WHERE r.r_name = 'ASIA'
    GROUP BY ps_partkey
)
SELECT s_acctbal, s_name, n_name, p_partkey, p_mfgr, s_address, s_phone, s_comment
FROM part
JOIN partsupp ON part.p_partkey = partsupp.ps_partkey
JOIN supplier ON supplier.s_suppkey = partsupp.ps_suppkey
JOIN nation ON supplier.s_nationkey = nation.n_nationkey
JOIN region ON nation.n_regionkey = region.r_regionkey
JOIN min_asia_costs ON partsupp.ps_partkey = min_asia_costs.ps_partkey 
                    AND partsupp.ps_supplycost = min_asia_costs.min_supplycost
WHERE part.p_size = 46
  AND part.p_type LIKE '%NICKEL'
  AND region.r_name = 'ASIA'
ORDER BY s_acctbal DESC, n_name, s_name, p_partkey
LIMIT 100;

original_query: select s_acctbal, s_name, n_name, p_partkey, p_mfgr, s_address, s_phone, s_comment from part, supplier, partsupp, nation, region where p_partkey = ps_partkey and s_suppkey = ps_suppkey and p_size = 3 and p_type like '%NICKEL' and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'AMERICA' and ps_supplycost = ( select min(ps_supplycost) from partsupp, supplier, nation, region where p_partkey = ps_partkey and s_suppkey = ps_suppkey and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'AMERICA' ) order by s_acctbal desc, n_name, s_name, p_partkey limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH america_region AS (
    SELECT r_regionkey
    FROM region
    WHERE r_name = 'AMERICA'
),
america_nations AS (
    SELECT n_nationkey, n_name
    FROM nation
    JOIN america_region ON n_regionkey = r_regionkey
),
filtered_parts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey, p_mfgr
    FROM part
    WHERE p_size = 3 AND p_type LIKE '%NICKEL'
),
min_supplycost AS (
    SELECT ps_partkey, MIN(ps_supplycost) AS min_cost
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN supplier s ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN america_nations an ON s.s_nationkey = an.n_nationkey
    GROUP BY ps_partkey
)
SELECT s.s_acctbal, s.s_name, an.n_name, fp.p_partkey, fp.p_mfgr, 
       s.s_address, s.s_phone, s.s_comment
FROM filtered_parts fp
JOIN partsupp ps ON fp.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN min_supplycost msc ON fp.p_partkey = msc.ps_partkey AND ps.ps_supplycost = msc.min_cost
JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN america_nations an ON s.s_nationkey = an.n_nationkey
ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC, an.n_name, s.s_name, fp.p_partkey
LIMIT 100;

original_query: select supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year, sum(volume) as revenue from ( select n1.n_name as supp_nation, n2.n_name as cust_nation, extract(year from l_shipdate) as l_year, l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) as volume from supplier, lineitem, orders, customer, nation n1, nation n2 where s_suppkey = l_suppkey and o_orderkey = l_orderkey and c_custkey = o_custkey and s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey and c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey and ( (n1.n_name = 'CANADA' and n2.n_name = 'CHINA') or (n1.n_name = 'CHINA' and n2.n_name = 'CANADA') ) and l_shipdate between date '1995-01-01' and date '1996-12-31' ) as shipping group by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year order by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year;
rewritten_query:
SELECT 
    n1.n_name AS supp_nation,
    n2.n_name AS cust_nation,
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l_shipdate) AS l_year,
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
    nation n1
JOIN supplier ON n1.n_nationkey = supplier.s_nationkey
JOIN lineitem ON supplier.s_suppkey = lineitem.l_suppkey
JOIN orders ON lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
JOIN customer ON orders.o_custkey = customer.c_custkey
JOIN nation n2 ON customer.c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey
WHERE 
    n1.n_name IN ('CANADA', 'CHINA')
    AND n2.n_name IN ('CANADA', 'CHINA')
    AND n1.n_name <> n2.n_name
    AND l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'
GROUP BY supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year
ORDER BY supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year;

original_query: select supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year, sum(volume) as revenue from ( select n1.n_name as supp_nation, n2.n_name as cust_nation, extract(year from l_shipdate) as l_year, l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) as volume from supplier, lineitem, orders, customer, nation n1, nation n2 where s_suppkey = l_suppkey and o_orderkey = l_orderkey and c_custkey = o_custkey and s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey and c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey and ( (n1.n_name = 'ETHIOPIA' and n2.n_name = 'FRANCE') or (n1.n_name = 'FRANCE' and n2.n_name = 'ETHIOPIA') ) and l_shipdate between date '1995-01-01' and date '1996-12-31' ) as shipping group by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year order by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year;
rewritten_query:
WITH nation_pairs AS (
  SELECT n1.n_nationkey as supp_nationkey, n1.n_name as supp_nation,
         n2.n_nationkey as cust_nationkey, n2.n_name as cust_nation
  FROM nation n1
  CROSS JOIN nation n2
  WHERE n1.n_name IN ('ETHIOPIA', 'FRANCE')
    AND n2.n_name IN ('ETHIOPIA', 'FRANCE')
    AND n1.n_name <> n2.n_name
)
SELECT supp_nation, cust_nation, extract(year FROM l_shipdate) as l_year,
       sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as revenue
FROM nation_pairs
JOIN supplier ON supplier.s_nationkey = supp_nationkey
JOIN customer ON customer.c_nationkey = cust_nationkey
JOIN orders ON orders.o_custkey = customer.c_custkey
JOIN lineitem ON lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
              AND lineitem.l_suppkey = supplier.s_suppkey
WHERE l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'
GROUP BY supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year

    SELECT s_suppkey
    FROM supplier
    WHERE s_comment LIKE '%Customer%Complaints%'
)
SELECT 
    p.p_brand,
    p.p_type,
    p.p_size,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey) AS supplier_cnt
FROM 
    part AS p
INNER JOIN 
    partsupp AS ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
LEFT JOIN 
    filtered_suppliers fs ON ps.ps_suppkey = fs.s_suppkey
WHERE 
    p.p_brand <> 'Brand#43'
    AND p.p_type NOT LIKE 'MEDIUM BURNISHED%'
    AND p.p_size IN (48, 45, 42, 31, 44, 33, 50, 3)
    AND fs.s_suppkey IS NULL
GROUP BY 
    p.p_brand,
    p.p_type,
    p.p_size
ORDER BY 
    supplier_cnt DESC,
    p.p_brand,
    p.p_type,
    p.p_size;

original_query: select sum(l_extendedprice) / 7.0 as avg_yearly from lineitem, part where p_partkey = l_partkey and p_brand = 'Brand#32' and p_container = 'WRAP PKG' and l_quantity < ( select 0.2 * avg(l_quantity) from lineitem where l_partkey = p_partkey );
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_parts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey
    FROM part
    WHERE p_brand = 'Brand#32' 
    AND p_container = 'WRAP PKG'
)
SELECT SUM(l.l_extendedprice) / 7.0 AS avg_yearly
FROM filtered_parts p
JOIN lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN (
    SELECT l_partkey, 0.2 * AVG(l_quantity) AS avg_quantity
    FROM lineitem l
    JOIN filtered_parts p ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
    GROUP BY l_partkey
) subq ON l.l_partkey = subq.l_partkey
WHERE l.l_quantity < subq.avg_quantity;

    WHERE p_brand = 'Brand#32' AND p_container = 'MED PKG'
),

original_query: select s_name, s_address from supplier, nation where s_suppkey in ( select ps_suppkey from partsupp where ps_partkey in ( select p_partkey from part where p_name like 'burnished%' ) and ps_availqty > ( select 0.5 * sum(l_quantity) from lineitem where l_partkey = ps_partkey and l_suppkey = ps_suppkey and l_shipdate >= date '1996-01-01' and l_shipdate < date '1996-01-01' + interval '1' year ) ) and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_name = 'GERMANY' order by s_name;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_parts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey
    FROM part
    WHERE p_name LIKE 'burnished%'
),
lineitem_sum AS (
    SELECT l_partkey, l_suppkey, 0.5 * SUM(l_quantity) AS total_half
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_shipdate >= DATE '1996-01-01'
      AND l_shipdate < DATE '1997-01-01'
    GROUP BY l_partkey, l_suppkey
)
SELECT s_name, s_address
FROM supplier
JOIN nation ON supplier.s_nationkey = nation.n_nationkey
WHERE nation.n_name = 'GERMANY'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM partsupp
    JOIN filtered_parts ON partsupp.ps_partkey = filtered_parts.p_partkey
    JOIN lineitem_sum ON partsupp.ps_partkey = lineitem_sum.l_partkey
                     AND partsupp.ps_suppkey = lineitem_sum.l_suppkey
    WHERE partsupp.ps_availqty > lineitem_sum.total_half
      AND partsupp.ps_suppkey = supplier.s_suppkey
  )
ORDER BY s_name;

original_query: select s_name, s_address from supplier, nation where s_suppkey in ( select ps_suppkey from partsupp where ps_partkey in ( select p_partkey from part where p_name like 'spring%' ) and ps_availqty > ( select 0.5 * sum(l_quantity) from lineitem where l_partkey = ps_partkey and l_suppkey = ps_suppkey and l_shipdate >= date '1997-01-01' and l_shipdate < date '1997-01-01' + interval '1' year ) ) and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_name = 'KENYA' order by s_name;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_part AS (
    SELECT p_partkey
    FROM part
    WHERE p_name LIKE 'spring%'
),
lineitem_agg AS (
    SELECT 
        l_partkey,
        l_suppkey,
        0.5 * SUM(l_quantity) AS half_sum_qty
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01'
      AND l_shipdate < DATE '1998-01-01'
    GROUP BY l_partkey, l_suppkey
)
SELECT s_name, s_address
FROM supplier
JOIN nation ON s_nationkey = n_nationkey
WHERE n_name = 'KENYA'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN filtered_part fp ON ps.ps_partkey = fp.p_partkey
    LEFT JOIN lineitem_agg la ON ps.ps_partkey = la.l_partkey AND ps.ps_suppkey = la.l_suppkey
    WHERE ps.ps_suppkey = supplier.s_suppkey
      AND ps.ps_availqty > COALESCE(la.half_sum_qty, 0)
)
ORDER BY s_name;

Use explicit JOIN syntax instead of implicit joins in the WHERE clause
Use LATERAL join to optimize the correlated subquery for lineitem aggregation
Use COALESCE to handle potential NULL values from the LEFT JOIN

original_query: select s_name, s_address from supplier, nation where s_suppkey in ( select ps_suppkey from partsupp where ps_partkey in ( select p_partkey from part where p_name like 'burlywood%' ) and ps_availqty > ( select 0.5 * sum(l_quantity) from lineitem where l_partkey = ps_partkey and l_suppkey = ps_suppkey and l_shipdate >= date '1994-01-01' and l_shipdate < date '1994-01-01' + interval '1' year ) ) and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_name = 'ETHIOPIA' order by s_name;
rewritten_query:
WITH lineitem_sum AS (
    SELECT l_partkey, l_suppkey, SUM(l_quantity) * 0.5 AS half_sum
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_shipdate >= DATE '1994-01-01'
    AND l_shipdate < DATE '1995-01-01'
    GROUP BY l_partkey, l_suppkey
),
burlywood_parts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey 
    FROM part 
    WHERE p_name LIKE 'burlywood%'
)
SELECT s_name, s_address
FROM supplier
JOIN nation ON s_nationkey = n_nationkey AND n_name = 'ETHIOPIA'
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM burlywood_parts
    JOIN partsupp ON ps_partkey = p_partkey AND ps_suppkey = supplier.s_suppkey
    JOIN lineitem_sum ON lineitem_sum.l_partkey = ps_partkey AND lineitem_sum.l_suppkey = ps_suppkey
    WHERE ps_availqty > lineitem_sum.half_sum
)
ORDER BY s_name;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Replace nested IN subqueries with EXISTS and use a CTE to precompute the lineitem sum calculations
Convert implicit joins to explicit JOIN syntax for better readability and optimization opportunities
Precompute the lineitem sum once for each partkey and suppkey combination to avoid recalculating for each partsupp row
Precalculate the 0.5 multiplier in the lineitem_sum CTE instead of in the subquery

original_query: select s_name, count(*) as numwait from supplier, lineitem l1, orders, nation where s_suppkey = l1.l_suppkey and o_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey and o_orderstatus = 'F' and l1.l_receiptdate > l1.l_commitdate and exists ( select * from lineitem l2 where l2.l_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey and l2.l_suppkey <> l1.l_suppkey ) and not exists ( select * from lineitem l3 where l3.l_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey and l3.l_suppkey <> l1.l_suppkey and l3.l_receiptdate > l3.l_commitdate ) and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_name = 'MOZAMBIQUE' group by s_name order by numwait desc, s_name limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH mozambique_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s_suppkey, s_name
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    WHERE n.n_name = 'MOZAMBIQUE'
),
filtered_lineitems AS (
    SELECT l_orderkey, l_suppkey, l_receiptdate, l_commitdate
    FROM lineitem 
    WHERE l_receiptdate > l_commitdate
)
SELECT s.s_name, COUNT(*) AS numwait
FROM mozambique_suppliers s
JOIN filtered_lineitems l1 ON s.s_suppkey = l1.l_suppkey
JOIN orders o ON l1.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey AND o.o_orderstatus = 'F'
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM lineitem l2
    WHERE l2.l_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey
    AND l2.l_suppkey <> l1.l_suppkey
    LIMIT 1
)
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM filtered_lineitems l3
    WHERE l3.l_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey
    AND l3.l_suppkey <> l1.l_suppkey
    LIMIT 1
)
GROUP BY s.s_name
ORDER BY numwait DESC, s.s_name
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Create a Common Table Expression (CTE) named 'filtered_lineitems' to precompute all lineitem rows where receipt date is greater than commit date. This reduces redundant scans on the large lineitem table (59 million rows) for both l1 and l3 references.
Replace implicit joins with explicit JOIN syntax for better readability and potentially better query optimization by the database engine.
Use the filtered_lineitems CTE for the l3 subquery to reduce the amount of data that needs to be processed in the NOT EXISTS condition.

original_query: select s_name, count(*) as numwait from supplier, lineitem l1, orders, nation where s_suppkey = l1.l_suppkey and o_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey and o_orderstatus = 'F' and l1.l_receiptdate > l1.l_commitdate and exists ( select * from lineitem l2 where l2.l_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey and l2.l_suppkey <> l1.l_suppkey ) and not exists ( select * from lineitem l3 where l3.l_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey and l3.l_suppkey <> l1.l_suppkey and l3.l_receiptdate > l3.l_commitdate ) and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_name = 'INDONESIA' group by s_name order by numwait desc, s_name limit 100;
rewritten_query:
SELECT s_name, COUNT(*) AS numwait
FROM supplier, lineitem l1, orders, nation
WHERE s_suppkey = l1.l_suppkey
  AND o_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey
  AND o_orderstatus = 'F'
  AND l1.l_receiptdate > l1.l_commitdate
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT *
    FROM lineitem l2
    WHERE l2.l_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey
      AND l2.l_suppkey <> l1.l_suppkey
  )
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT *
    FROM lineitem l3
    WHERE l3.l_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey
      AND l3.l_suppkey <> l1.l_suppkey
      AND l3.l_receiptdate > l3.l_commitdate
  )
  AND s_nationkey = n_nationkey
  AND n_name = 'INDONESIA'
GROUP BY s_name
ORDER BY numwait DESC, s_name
LIMIT 100;

original_query: select cntrycode, count(*) as numcust, sum(c_acctbal) as totacctbal from ( select substring(c_phone from 1 for 2) as cntrycode, c_acctbal from customer where substring(c_phone from 1 for 2) in ('17', '22', '12', '18', '34', '25', '16') and c_acctbal > ( select avg(c_acctbal) from customer where c_acctbal > 0.00 and substring(c_phone from 1 for 2) in ('17', '22', '12', '18', '34', '25', '16') ) and not exists ( select * from orders where o_custkey = c_custkey ) ) as custsale group by cntrycode order by cntrycode;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_customers AS (
    SELECT 
        SUBSTRING(c_phone FROM 1 FOR 2) AS cntrycode, 
        c_acctbal, 
        c_custkey
    FROM customer
    WHERE SUBSTRING(c_phone FROM 1 FOR 2) IN ('17','22','12','18','34','25','16')
),
avg_balance AS (
    SELECT AVG(c_acctbal) AS avg_bal
    FROM filtered_customers
    WHERE c_acctbal > 0.00
)
SELECT 
    cntrycode, 
    COUNT(*) AS numcust, 
    SUM(c_acctbal) AS totacctbal
FROM filtered_customers
WHERE c_acctbal > (SELECT avg_bal FROM avg_balance)
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_custkey = filtered_customers.c_custkey
)
GROUP BY cntrycode
ORDER BY cntrycode;

original_query: select cntrycode, count(*) as numcust, sum(c_acctbal) as totacctbal from ( select substring(c_phone from 1 for 2) as cntrycode, c_acctbal from customer where substring(c_phone from 1 for 2) in ('24', '31', '26', '34', '30', '22', '14') and c_acctbal > ( select avg(c_acctbal) from customer where c_acctbal > 0.00 and substring(c_phone from 1 for 2) in ('24', '31', '26', '34', '30', '22', '14') ) and not exists ( select * from orders where o_custkey = c_custkey ) ) as custsale group by cntrycode order by cntrycode;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_customers AS (
    SELECT 
        substring(c_phone from 1 for 2) as cntrycode,
        c_acctbal,
        c_custkey
    FROM customer
    WHERE substring(c_phone from 1 for 2) IN ('14', '22', '24', '26', '30', '31', '34')
),
avg_balance AS (
    SELECT avg(c_acctbal) as avg_val
    FROM filtered_customers
    WHERE c_acctbal > 0.00
)
SELECT 
    cntrycode,
    count(*) as numcust,
    sum(c_acctbal) as totacctbal
FROM filtered_customers fc
WHERE 
    fc.c_acctbal > (SELECT avg_val FROM avg_balance)
    AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM orders o WHERE o.o_custkey = fc.c_custkey
    )
GROUP BY cntrycode
ORDER BY cntrycode;
